STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSTRUCTION DESIGN ASSOCIATES WEISSMAN, MICHELLE FRANCIS, DONALD $7,728.67 PRINCIPAL, $1,875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $714.87 INTEREST, $1,509.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,827.54, - IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED PLAINTIFF IS THE OWER OF THE LEASED EQUIPMENT DESCRIBED AS USED BLESSE ROVER 321 R MACHINING CENTER WITH THE IMMEDIATE RIGHT TO POSSESSION THEREOF AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANTS, IN THE EVENT PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION OF SELLS SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY.
